summary: Employee Role & Team Bug Fixes - All 12 backend tests pass (100%), UI verification complete. Bug fixes verified: (1) PUT /api/hr/employees/{id} now accepts and saves 'role' field correctly, (2) PUT /api/hr/employees/{id} now accepts and saves 'team_id' field correctly, (3) Role changes sync to linked user account, (4) Team_id changes sync to linked user account (REQUIRED UserBase model fix for API response), (5) All joining_date fields normalized to YYYY-MM-DD format via _normalize_date helper.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/hr/employees/sync-options returns roles and teams for dropdowns
Backend: GET /api/hr/employees/{id} returns role and team_id fields
Backend: PUT /api/hr/employees/{id} - role field saves correctly (Pydantic EmployeeUpdate model fix verified)
Backend: PUT /api/hr/employees/{id} - team_id field saves correctly (Pydantic EmployeeUpdate model fix verified)
Backend: Role change syncs to linked user account in users collection
Backend: team_id change syncs to linked user account in users collection
Backend: GET /api/hr/employees - All joining_date fields normalized to YYYY-MM-DD
Backend: GET /api/hr/employees/{id} - Single employee dates normalized
Backend: Date normalization verified across sample employees
Backend: EmployeeUpdate Pydantic model accepts 'role' without validation error
Backend: EmployeeUpdate Pydantic model accepts 'team_id' without validation error
Backend: Both role and team_id can be updated in single PUT request
Frontend: Add Employee modal shows 'System Role *' dropdown
Frontend: Add Employee modal shows 'Team' dropdown
Frontend: Edit Employee modal shows 'System Role *' dropdown with pre-filled value
Frontend: Edit Employee modal shows 'Team' dropdown with pre-filled value (e.g., 'TEAM CLOSING MACHINE')
Frontend: Employee list shows uniform YYYY-MM-DD date format in Joining Date column

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: UserBase Pydantic model missing team_id field
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added 'team_id: Optional[str] = None' field to UserBase model
bugs_fixed_during_testing.impact: team_id was being saved to users collection but not returned in GET /api/users response due to ConfigDict(extra='ignore')

role_saving.details: EmployeeUpdate Pydantic model (lines 186-214) includes role: Optional[str] = None. PUT endpoint syncs role to linked user.

team_id_saving.details: EmployeeUpdate Pydantic model includes team_id: Optional[str] = None. PUT endpoint syncs team_id to linked user.

date_normalization.details: _normalize_date helper (lines 10815-10829) converts DD/MM/YYYY to YYYY-MM-DD. Applied in GET /api/hr/employees (line 10871) and GET /api/hr/employees/{id} (line 10980).

employee_modal_dropdowns.details: EmployeeModal.jsx (lines 70-81) includes System Role and Team dropdowns. sync-options endpoint provides roles/teams data.

critical_code_review_comments: EmployeeUpdate model now correctly includes both 'role' and 'team_id' fields (hr_module.py lines 207-208)
EmployeeResponse model includes team_id field (server.py line 10788)
User-employee sync in update_employee correctly handles role (line 12097-12098) and team_id (lines 12101-12102)
_normalize_date function handles both DD/MM/YYYY and DD-MM-YYYY formats
UserBase model FIX APPLIED: Added team_id field to ensure API responses include synced team_id
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employee Mohamadaffan (id: 57d8e008-8e9b-4894-ab4c-111949f08370, user_id: 75c90474-9d95-4419-ae6a-51f266d017bb) for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee role and team_id bug fixes verified. EmployeeUpdate model now accepts role and team_id fields. Changes sync to linked user accounts. Date normalization working for all date fields. UserBase model was missing team_id field - this was fixed during testing to ensure GET /api/users returns team_id. Test employee Mohamadaffan has role=team_leader and team_id set after testing.
testing_method: Backend pytest (12 tests) + Playwright browser automation for UI verification with screenshots
